languages.text: {n}Вокс-синтезатор Себериана издает насмешливую трель.{/n} "Я не приносил извинений. Но я рад, что мы оставили обиды позади".
{n}Seberian's vox-synthesiser emits a mocking trill.{/n} "I made no apology. But I am glad we have left our grievances behind."
languages.original_text: {n}Вокс-синтезатор Себериана издает насмешливую трель.{/n} "Я не приносил извинений. Но я рад, что мы оставили обиды позади".

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian's vox-synthesiser emits a mocking trill.{/n} "I offered no apology. But I am glad we have left our grievances behind."

{n}Seberian's vox-synthesiser emits a mocking trill.{/n} "I made no apology. But I am glad we have left our grievances behind."
{n}Seberian's vox-synthesiser emits a mocking trill.{/n} "I made no apology. But I am glad we have left our grievances behind."

languages.text: {n}Seberian stößt ein spöttisches Trillern aus.{/n} "Ich habe mich nicht entschuldigt. Aber ich bin froh, dass wir unseren Unmut hinter uns lassen konnten."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's vox-synthesiser emits a mocking trill.{/n} "I made no apology. But I am glad we have left our grievances behind."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian stößt ein spöttisches Trillern aus.{/n} "Ich habe mich nicht entschuldigt. Aber ich bin froh, dass wir unseren Unmut hinter uns lassen konnten."

languages.text: {n}Le synthétiseur-vox de Seberian émet un trille moqueur.{/n} « Je ne vous en ai présenté aucune. Mais je me réjouis que nous puissions mettre nos différends de côté. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's vox-synthesiser emits a mocking trill.{/n} "I made no apology. But I am glad we have left our grievances behind."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le synthétiseur-vox de Seberian émet un trille moqueur.{/n} « Je ne vous en ai présenté aucune. Mais je me réjouis que nous puissions mettre nos différends de côté. »

languages.text: {n}El voco sintetizador de Seberian emite un sonido burlón.{/n} «No he ofrecido ninguna disculpa, pero me alegro de dejar atrás nuestras rencillas».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's vox-synthesiser emits a mocking trill.{/n} "I made no apology. But I am glad we have left our grievances behind."

traits.locale_text: {n}El voco sintetizador de Seberian emite un sonido burlón.{/n} «No he ofrecido ninguna disculpa, pero me alegro de dejar atrás nuestras rencillas».

languages.text: {n}Seberian'ın voks sentezleyicisi, alaycı bir ses çıkarıyor.{/n} "Özür dilemedim. Ancak kırgınlıklarımızı geride bırakabilmemize sevindim."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's vox-synthesiser emits a mocking trill.{/n} "I made no apology. But I am glad we have left our grievances behind."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian'ın voks sentezleyicisi, alaycı bir ses çıkarıyor.{/n} "Özür dilemedim. Ancak kırgınlıklarımızı geride bırakabilmemize sevindim."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安的音阵合成器发出一声嘲弄的颤音。{/n}“我可没道歉。不过我很高兴我们已经放下了往日的恩怨。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's vox-synthesiser emits a mocking trill.{/n} "I made no apology. But I am glad we have left our grievances behind."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安的音阵合成器发出一声嘲弄的颤音。{/n}“我可没道歉。不过我很高兴我们已经放下了往日的恩怨。”

languages.text: {n}セベリアンのヴォックス・シンセサイザーは嘲弄的な音色を奏でる。{/n} 「私は謝罪はしていない。しかし、私たちは不満を置いてきたことを喜んでいる。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's vox-synthesiser emits a mocking trill.{/n} "I made no apology. But I am glad we have left our grievances behind."
